archetype: Automated Submarine Cable Route Optimization and Seabed Interaction Monitoring System for Transoceanic Telecommunications
description: This system optimizes submarine cable routes to minimize environmental impact and reduce the risk of seabed interactions, while ensuring compliance with international telecommunications regulations. It is used by cable operators and marine surveyors to plan and monitor cable deployments. The system must account for complex seabed topography, ocean currents, and marine life habitats.
rules: MUST comply with ITU-T L.1750 recommendations for submarine cable route planning
MUST integrate with marine survey data formats such as IHO S-100
MUST account for environmental impact assessments in accordance with OSPAR Convention
MUST ensure compliance with Flag State and Coastal State regulations for cable deployments
MUST support real-time monitoring of seabed interactions and cable burial depth
anti_patterns: DO NOT use simplified 2D route planning models that neglect seabed topography and ocean currents
DO NOT ignore environmental impact assessments for sensitive marine habitats
DO NOT rely solely on manual survey data without integrating with automated sensing technologies
key_technical_challenges: Integrating complex geospatial data from multiple sources, including marine surveys and satellite imagery
Developing predictive models for seabed interactions and cable burial depth
Optimizing route planning algorithms for real-time computation and minimal environmental impact

recommended_stack.language: Python + extensive libraries for geospatial data processing and machine learning
recommended_stack.framework: Django + support for complex data models and real-time monitoring
recommended_stack.database_engine: PostGIS + spatial database capabilities for efficient geospatial queries
recommended_stack.cache: Redis + high-performance caching for real-time data processing
recommended_stack.message_broker: RabbitMQ + support for asynchronous data processing and integration with sensing technologies

compliance_flags: Flag State and Coastal State regulations
